Description: Triggers fulfillment data generator Lambda every day at 2am UTC

Notes.Purpose: Daily incremental data generation for testing and development
Notes.WhenToEnable: During testing phase — generates 1 day of data per run
Notes.WhenToDisable: Switch to weekly rule for production
Notes.UTCTime: 2:00 AM UTC = 10:00 PM EST / 9:00 PM CST
Notes.DataGenerated: ~27,000 rows across 7 fact tables for 1 day
